title: CSAT Surveys & Customer Feedback
content:
Customer Satisfaction (CSAT) surveys let you measure how happy customers are after ticket resolution.

**Enabling CSAT:**
Settings → CSAT → Enable. Choose when surveys are sent: On ticket close, or 1 hour after resolution.

**Survey Format:**
Customers receive an email: 'Was your issue resolved? Rate us: 👍 / 👎' with an optional comment box.

**Viewing Results:**
Dashboard → CSAT widget. Reports → CSAT Report for detailed breakdown by agent, team, category, and date range.

**CSAT Score Calculation:**
(Positive responses / Total responses) × 100. Industry benchmark: >80% is good.

**Custom Questions:**
Pro and Enterprise plans support custom survey questions and branding. Settings → CSAT → Customize Survey.
